positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed illustration of a whimsical celestial botanical arrangement. The composition features interconnected lunar flora, glowing phosphorescent mushrooms, and abstract constellation vines woven around a central, stylized crescent moon. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau elegance and modern clean vector art, with sharp, graphic edges and strong silhouettes. Use a deep indigo and cosmic teal palette contrasted by vibrant pops of gold leaf and bioluminescent cyan. The background should be solid or negative space suitable for placement on apparel. Highly stylized, perfect for commercial screen printing, centered composition, dramatic spotlighting, ultra-detailed, clean line art.
negative: photorealism, blurry, lowres, grain, watermark, text, signature, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, clutter, messy, dirty, grayscale
